content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Validate Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't validate ideas. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code for faster shipping.
content.answer_block: Stop burning weeks on unproven concepts. By leveraging Claude Code to automate architecture and Antigravity to scaffold production-ready code, you can move from a raw idea to a functional MVP in hours. This setup transforms your workflow, allowing you to validate market demand through rapid, high-fidelity technical prototypes.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal, the weight of a dozen 'next big things' pressing down on your chest. You know the drill: spend three days on the boilerplate, another week debugging auth, and by the time you're ready to show a client, the momentum—and the opportunity—has evaporated. The graveyard of freelance careers is paved with unvalidated ideas that never saw the light of a browser.

But the game has changed. By integrating Claude Code into your development lifecycle, you shift from a coder to a product architect. We aren't just writing scripts; we are deploying high-velocity validation engines. This guide strips away the friction, giving you a repeatable system to ship, test, and pivot before your competitors have even finished their coffee.

steps.title: Environment Scaffolding
steps.description: Initialize a standardized workspace that enforces clean architecture from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a clean, modular Next.js 14 project structure with Tailwind CSS, Lucide icons, and a Supabase integration scaffold optimized for rapid MVP iteration.

steps.title: Database Schema Definition
steps.description: Generate a robust schema that supports future scaling without the usual migration headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for a subscription-based SaaS platform including users, subscriptions, and usage_logs tables with RLS policies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply schema.sql to the current supabase project'

steps.title: UI Component Injection
steps.description: Rapidly build the frontend by composing high-quality, reusable UI components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard layout using shadcn/ui components, featuring a sidebar navigation, a data table for user logs, and a summary stats card group.

steps.title: API Route Implementation
steps.description: Automate the creation of secure server-side logic to handle client requests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure Next.js API route that validates user sessions and returns paginated usage logs from Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create api route for logs with zod validation'

steps.title: Validation & Testing
steps.description: Verify the build integrity before deploying to a staging environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a comprehensive test suite using Playwright to verify the authentication flow and the data fetching logic of the dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate and run playwright tests for the dashboard'

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, saving tokens.
Chain your prompts: Ask Antigravity to define the interfaces first, then feed those into Claude Code to ensure type safety across the stack.
Use Claude Code's 'review' mode on your own legacy code to identify technical debt before starting a new feature.
Treat your Antigravity prompts as 'Prompt Engineering Assets'; save them in a Notion library for instant reuse across different client projects.
Force the model to explain its architectural decisions by adding 'Explain your reasoning for this dependency choice' to every complex prompt.
content.next_steps: After completing your first MVP, deploy to Vercel to gather real-world user feedback. Use the data collected to iterate on your next feature set using the same Claude Code pipeline.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your best ideas die on the vine due to slow development cycles. Master the tools that turn hours of coding into minutes of architecture. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
